content:
# User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI app, premium SaaS, creative tool, mobile app concept, hero board, component showcase
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-ui-kit

Visual traits:
- liquid glass
- thick translucent material
- frosted blur
- rounded capsule geometry
- specular highlights
- chromatic edge glow
- soft refractive shadows
- pale luminous background
- tactile 3D controls

Use when:
- AI app
- premium SaaS
- creative tool
- mobile app concept
- hero board
- component showcase

Avoid when:
- dense enterprise data table
- low-end device UI
- high contrast compliance screen
- long text reading page
- serious financial/legal form

AI summary: Use this when the user asks for Liquid Glass or glassmorphism like the provided screenshots: thick rounded translucent components, frosted blur, glossy specular highlights, chromatic edge glow, soft refractive shadows, and tactile 3D pill controls.

source_name: User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots
content:
# User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI app, premium SaaS, creative tool, mobile app concept, hero board, component showcase
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-ui-kit

- Use large radius values so buttons and inputs feel like rounded glass capsules rather than flat rectangles.
- Layer controls above a soft light background or blurred gradient so transparency has something to refract.
- Keep generous spacing between glass components because their shadows and glow need breathing room.
- Use a small set of accent colors as internal glow, not as flat fills across every component.
- Use heavier glass blocks for hero cards and lighter glass pills for secondary controls.

AI summary: Use this when the user asks for Liquid Glass or glassmorphism like the provided screenshots: thick rounded translucent components, frosted blur, glossy specular highlights, chromatic edge glow, soft refractive shadows, and tactile 3D pill controls.

content:
# User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI app, premium SaaS, creative tool, mobile app concept, hero board, component showcase
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-ui-kit

- Do not put low-contrast gray text on transparent glass; text should usually be near-black on light glass or white on dark glass.
- Use glass as a surface treatment, not as the only state indicator; pair color with icons or text.
- Offer a reduced-transparency fallback for accessibility and low-performance devices.

AI summary: Use this when the user asks for Liquid Glass or glassmorphism like the provided screenshots: thick rounded translucent components, frosted blur, glossy specular highlights, chromatic edge glow, soft refractive shadows, and tactile 3D pill controls.

source_name: User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots
content:
# User-provided Liquid Glass UI Kit screenshots - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: AI app, premium SaaS, creative tool, mobile app concept, hero board, component showcase
Evidence: screenshot_observed / high
Source: local-chat-reference:2026-04-25/liquid-glass-ui-kit

- CSS baseline: backdrop-filter blur, translucent background, layered box-shadow, inner border, inset highlight, and pseudo-elements for glossy streaks.
- Use radial gradients at corners to simulate caustic color glints and edge refraction.
- For realistic glass, combine outer drop shadow, inner white highlight, subtle dark inner stroke, and a top-left glossy reflection.
- Animate hover by moving highlight and increasing rim brightness, not by scaling aggressively.
- Use sparingly for dense enterprise tables; reserve full liquid glass for hero, cards, buttons, search, modal, and navigation shells.

AI summary: Use this when the user asks for Liquid Glass or glassmorphism like the provided screenshots: thick rounded translucent components, frosted blur, glossy specular highlights, chromatic edge glow, soft refractive shadows, and tactile 3D pill controls.
